LanguageData.VFEPD_AmbrandyDistillery.description: A gilded distillery of very delicate craftsmanship meant for aging ambrosia must into a drinkable form. This one is inactive and non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AmbrandyDistillery.label: ambrandy distillery
LanguageData.VFEPD_Bar.description: A somewhat ornate countertop stocked to the brim with different vessels and devices for making a variety of drinks.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Bar.label: decorative bar
LanguageData.VFEPD_DecorativeSodaFountain.description: An all-in-one soda manufacturing unit. This one is inactive and non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DecorativeSodaFountain.label: soda fountain
LanguageData.VFEPD_GinStill.description: A fully metal industrial distilling device, meant to purify and ferment gin into a drinkable form. This one is empty and non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GinStill.label: gin still
LanguageData.VFEPD_TequilaBarrel.description: A small still and fermenter combo unit. This one is empty and non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_TequilaBarrel.label: tequila barrel
LanguageData.VFEPD_VodkaDrum.description: A cheap container meant for storing water retrofitted to be air tight for short-term fermenting. This one is empty and non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VodkaDrum.label: vodka drum
LanguageData.VFEPD_WhiskeyCask.description: A huge barrel meant for aging a high volume of whiskey at once. This one is empty and non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_WhiskeyCask.label: whiskey cask
